creator: greg@greg.rim.or.jp
text:
<19990227193907.44942.sada@rr.iij4u.or.jp>$B$N5-;v$K$*$$$F(B
sada@FreeBSD.ORG$B$5$s$O=q$-$^$7$?!#(B

>> And, I transfered a archive on 
>> 	ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.ORG/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/ports-wget-1.5.3.tar.gz
>> Please commit it.
>
>Could you please send us diffs to present version of the port ?

OK !, It is right to be port/net/wget on port-current based ?

This diffs support

	1 If-Modified-Since header support
	2 fix rewrite problem for hyperlink
	3 fix rewrite problem for "&" escape

So, 1 and 2 will be include for next version of wget.
And 3's patch is reported to wget maintener

So this is diffs to present version
